title: Crimes Committed by Type
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT CrimeType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY CrimeType ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} crime(s) committed during the report period. This is your official rap sheet broken down by crime category — murder vs. assault vs. cargo theft vs. trespass paint distinct pictures of whether you're a pirate, a careless pilot, or an ambitious criminal enterprise operating at scale.
details.help: CommitCrime CrimeType values include murder, assault, disobeyPolice, illegalCargo, and others. total drives the title as the total criminal incident count.

tagLines: Criminal activity log compiled. Incident breakdown by crime category noted in the security record.
The Pilots Federation notes every transgression. This is yours. Own it.
Some crimes are operational decisions. Others are accidents with consequences. The type column clarifies which.
